title: cyamopsis psoraloides
intro: Cyamopsis psoraloides, also known as the psoralia or pigeon pea, is a leguminous plant native to India and the Middle East. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Cyamopsis psoraloides has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions, and are often used to support overall health and wellness.
